name: Beef and Spinach Pita Pockets
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup sour cream or plain yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, combine the ground round, minced garlic, and crushed red pepper. Cook over medium heat until browned, stirring to crumble the beef.
2. In a saucepan, slowly heat the spices (cumin, coriander, ginger, salt) in butter.
3. Drain the beef from the skillet using a paper towel.
4. Return the beef mixture to the skillet; add the chopped spinach, spices, and salt. Stir well.
5. Cover and cook over medium heat for 5 minutes or until the spinach is wilted. Remove from heat.
6. Line each pita half with whole spinach leaves.
7. Spoon 1/2 cup of beef mixture into each pita half.
8. Mix the sour cream (or yogurt) with curry powder in a separate bowl.
9. Top each pita half with 1 tablespoon of the sour cream or yogurt mixture.
